characters.notes: Warrior, Mage, and Rogue imported PNG sprites are active in character select, overworld, and battle. The older Python-drawn characters remain as fallback code in main.py.

enemies.notes: Ghost Face is the first active enemy sprite. Enemy and boss sprites should be grouped by element or boss name.

sounds.notes: Use short WAV/OGG files for UI, attacks, hits, doors, and boss roars.

music.notes: Loopable themes can replace the procedural music system later.

effects.notes: Fire Tornado, Mage Fire Blast impact, and Mage normal magic fireball overlays are active. Store raw GIF/video sources here and cut game-ready PNG frames into named processed subfolders.

ui.notes: Dragon app icon is active. Panels, icons, potion graphics, and map markers also belong here.
